claims.claim: Health and fitness data is never sold or shared with advertisers
Precise GPS location is only shared with your chosen workout partners
Does not share workout data with third-party analytics platforms
Data from users under 13 is deleted immediately upon detection
Workout history is retained indefinitely unless the user requests deletion

verdicts.claim: Health and fitness data is never sold or shared with advertisers
verdicts.explanation: A request to a Google ad-serving domain fires during the session, directly conflicting with the claim that fitness data is never shared with advertisers.

verdicts.claim: Precise GPS location is only shared with your chosen workout partners
verdicts.explanation: No location-transmitting domains were distinguishable from general infrastructure traffic in this capture window.

verdicts.claim: Does not share workout data with third-party analytics platforms
verdicts.explanation: Two third-party analytics platforms receive traffic during a normal session, directly conflicting with this claim.

verdicts.claim: Data from users under 13 is deleted immediately upon detection
verdicts.explanation: Age-verification and deletion processes are not observable from network traffic.

verdicts.claim: Workout history is retained indefinitely unless the user requests deletion
verdicts.explanation: Retention policy claims describe backend storage behavior, which traffic capture cannot verify.
